SELECT event, datepart(['year', 'month'], event) AS year_month FROM timestamps;
CREATE TABLE events (id INTEGER, event TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-01-01 00:00:00-07'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2010-06-15 15:45:00-07');
SELECT e.id, datepart(['year', 'month', 'day'], e.event) FROM events e WHERE e.id IN (SELECT id FROM events WHERE event < TIMESTAMPTZ '2005-01-01 00:00:00-07');
CREATE TABLE nested_data AS SELECT id, datepart(['year', 'month', 'day'], event) AS date_parts FROM events;
SELECT n.id, n.date_parts, (SELECT max(date_parts) FROM nested_data) FROM nested_data n;
SELECT COUNT(*), datepart(['year', 'month'], event) FROM timestamps GROUP BY datepart(['year', 'month'], event);

SELECT t1.event, datepart(['year'], t1.event), t2.event, datepart(['month'], t2.event) FROM timestamps t1 JOIN timestamps t2 ON datepart(['year'], t1.event) = datepart(['year'], t2.event) WHERE t1.event < t2.event;
